subtasks.description: Query AWS spend database to retrieve current contracted commitment levels, monthly spend actuals, and utilization metrics across all AWS accounts and service categories

Reconcile contracted commitments against actual spend data, calculate variance metrics (overcommitment %, underutilization %), and identify patterns by service type and time period to classify commitment posture

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks required: (1) sql_gen (mid-tier) to extract commitment and spend data from the warehouse with joins across commitment contracts and actual spend tables—this is moderate complexity requiring multi-table aggregation. (2) cross_recon (mid-tier) to reconcile the two datasets and produce variance analysis and classification of over/undercommitment by segment—the reconciliation logic itself is moderate complexity, well-suited to mid-tier without requiring frontier-level inference. No policy_action needed (this is analysis, not governance approval). No multitool_plan needed (this is a self-contained SQL + reconciliation flow, not multi-tool registry invocation).

output.sql: SELECT cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS actual_spend_usd, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.license_id) AS license_count, SUM(inf.amount_usd) AS contracted_commit_usd, SUM(cf.amount_usd) - SUM(inf.amount_usd) AS spend_vs_commit_variance, CASE WHEN SUM(inf.amount_usd) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(cf.amount_usd) / SUM(inf.amount_usd)) * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS utilization_pct, CASE WHEN SUM(cf.amount_usd) > SUM(inf.amount_usd) THEN 'OVERCOMMITMENT' WHEN SUM(cf.amount_usd) < SUM(inf.amount_usd) * 0.80 THEN 'UNDERUTILIZATION' ELSE 'ON_TRACK' END AS commitment_status FROM consumption_facts cf LEFT JOIN invoice_facts inf ON cf.license_id = inf.contract_id AND cf.publisher = inf.vendor_name WHERE cf.publisher ILIKE '%AWS%' OR cf.publisher ILIKE '%Amazon%' GROUP BY cf.publisher, cf.product, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year DESC, cf.fiscal_quarter DESC, actual_spend_usd DESC
